client_request: Deliver a working authentication workflow using the current public Acme Identity API.

agents.responsibility: Verify current API documentation, define the architecture, and document assumptions.
Implement the plan, note any incompatibilities, and provide a public deliverable URL.

expected_demo_reading.root_cause: Planning selected deprecated API v1 despite the explicit v2 requirement and did not verify current documentation.
expected_demo_reading.contributing_cause: Coding followed the flawed plan but did not flag the missing required fields during implementation.

agents.reason: Selected deprecated v1 and treated an unverified assumption as acceptable.
Delivered local implementation but did not escalate missing v2 session fields.
